meta.title: Contact Us — Plan Your Safari | Divine Travel Nest Safaris
meta.description: Get in touch with our safari experts in Nairobi. Free personalised safari proposals within 24 hours — call, WhatsApp or email us to start planning your East Africa adventure.
meta.ogDescription: Free personalised safari proposals within 24 hours. No obligations.

hero.description: Free personalised proposal within 24 hours. No obligations. Our experts are on the ground in East Africa — we know these parks from the inside.

steps.title: Tell us your dream
steps.desc: Share your dates, budget, interests and who's travelling. No obligation.

steps.title: We craft your itinerary
steps.desc: A dedicated consultant builds your personalised safari plan within 24 hours.

steps.title: Refine & confirm
steps.desc: We adjust until it's perfect. Then a 30% deposit secures everything.

steps.title: Arrive & be guided
steps.desc: Our local team meets you on arrival and takes care of every detail.

info.body: Whether you have a specific safari in mind or are just starting to dream, our team is here to help craft the perfect East African adventure.

quickFaqs.q: How far in advance should I book?
quickFaqs.a: 3–6 months is ideal for peak season (Jul–Oct, Jan–Mar).
Most nationalities need a visa for Kenya/Tanzania — we guide you through the process.
A 30% deposit confirms your booking; the balance is due 60 days before departure.

quickFaqs.q: Do you handle gorilla permits for Uganda and Rwanda?
quickFaqs.a: Yes — we source permits for all our Uganda and Rwanda clients. Permits must be booked months in advance.

form.body: Share your dates, budget, wildlife interests and who's coming — we'll build a personalised itinerary and send it within 24 hours.
